positive: Minimalist abstract design featuring a stylized celestial creature, like a geometric phoenix or griffin, soaring against a deep twilight sky. The creature should be rendered in sharp, contrasting silhouette lines (black and white style) with subtle gold foil accents along the wings and tail. Background elements include stylized crescent moons, constellation patterns, and dispersed geometric stars. The overall composition must be symmetrical and centered for high impact on apparel. Utilize a Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print influence mixed with modern geometric vector art style. Clean lines, strong contrasts, perfect symmetry, high-resolution vector art look.
